video_subject: A terrified Indian woman in a simple cotton outfit, walking slowly through a long abandoned hospital corridor under flickering fluorescent lights, her South Asian features highlighted by the harsh, eerie lighting.
motion_dynamics: Slow, trembling walk; flickering light pulses; deep shadows creeping along the walls; subtle breath vapor visible in the damp air; high-tension stillness.
temporal_storyboard: 0s: Subject enters the frame at the end of a long corridor, looking into the darkness with visible dread.
4s: The overhead lights flicker violently as she stops, her face partially obscured by shadow.
8s: Close-up on her eyes, wide with terror, reflecting the cold greenish cast of the flickering lights.
visual_style: Psychological Horror. Camera: Cinema Digital 35mm, Lens: Prime Lens Classic, Focal Length: 85mm, Aperture: f/2. Green Cast film stock, Desaturated dread movie look. Moody rim lighting and high-contrast shadows.
negative_prompt: shaky camera, low framerate, flickering (unintentional), distorted faces, text, watermarks, morphing artifacts, warm lighting, bright saturated colors.
